title: berkheya zeyheri
intro: Berkheya zeyheri, also known as the African daisy or bergkrans, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Berkheya zeyheri are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds due to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Berkheya zeyheri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
